title: PsuInsertedV0
description: An alert indicating that a power supply unit (PSU) has been inserted into a power shelf.

rack_id.description: The ID of the rack containing the power shelf.

Baseboard.description: Properties that uniquely identify an Oxide hardware component

PowerShelf.description: Describes the power shelf involved in an alert.

baseboard.description: The baseboard FRU identity of the power shelf controller that was installed in the power shelf at the time the event occurred.

shelf.description:
The physical shelf number of the power shelf involved in the alert.

This will always be either 0 or 1.

Psu.description: Describes a power supply unit (PSU) involved in an alert.

identity.description:
The FRU identity of the PSU, if it could be determined.

This value may be NULL if the identity of the PSU could not be read due to a hardware failure.

slot.description:
The slot number of the PSU within the power shelf.

This will always be an integer between 0 and 5 (inclusive), since each power shelf can contain up to 6 PSUs.

PsuIdentity.description:
Describes the FRU identity of a power supply unit (PSU).

Note that this is *not* in the same format as Oxide FRU identities.
